feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Will Resident Evil ever do anything meaningful with Jill Valentine again or is i…
entry.content: Will Resident Evil ever do anything meaningful with Jill Valentine again or is it just going to be the franchise's second most popular character being sidelined for spinoffs between the Leon show and desperate attempts to get people to give a shit about the Redfields/whatever new OCs they cooked up? Grace was alright I guess. Probably the best attempt at "next generation of RE heroes" the series has done.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >capeshit protagonist doesn't kill violent hardened criminals because their fine…
entry.content: >capeshit protagonist doesn't kill violent hardened criminals because their fine, upstanding guardians were killed Well those aren't really equivalent situations. Why isn't there some hard scrabble hero whose dead parents were dirtbags who arguably got what was coming to them? Like that case of the pregnant burglar who got her dome exploded by the eighty year old man- say that baby survived and became a superhero, they'd have more reason to spare a criminal's sorry hide than Bruce Wayne.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >I've been asking stuff to Gemini and it's clear to me that it ''reasons'', he u…
entry.content: >I've been asking stuff to Gemini and it's clear to me that it ''reasons'', he understands the context of the issues I'm presenting them which is something normal search engines don't >Like for instance I was trying to add a custom shortcut to Gesturefy so that with a gesture it would find highlighted words on Google, however I had just copy pasted the google url in the search engine box on Gesturefy, Gemini deducted what the error was just by looking at a screenshot I provided it and told me ho

entry.title: /b/ Random: Daily Reminder that circumcision is genital mutilation.
entry.content: Sensitive question: does child circumcision seem pedophilic to you? Growing up I always viewed the glans as the most private part of my body. And still to this day I believe it's the most intimate part of the male anatomy. I never feel more naked than when I am retracted and the glans is exposed. The foreskin offers some type of privacy for my most intimate area But our society is cutting these young children to make their most private area uncovered, exposed, naked, and vulnerable. And intentio

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /mubiz/ physical distribution
entry.content: i dont have any listeners on my socials, and i'm horrible at marketing. what i do have is intermediate design skills and a ton of free time. i'm thinking i should start making CDs, and sell them together with my friend who goes to a college full of people who might be into my stuff. how do you guys think i should approach this? all advice accepted, from cover designs to business practices. and i will answer almost any question if it means getting better answers

entry.title: /g/ Technology: MSI 271UPXW12I vs GIGABYTE MO27Q28GR
entry.content: I need some monitor shopping advice. I just caught wind of the MSI 271UPXW12I: https://www.msi.com/Business-Produc tivity-Monitor/PRO-MAX-271UPXW12I. It's a 27" 4K 120Hz Samsung penta-tandem QD-OLED matte monitor. I recently got the GIGABYTE MO27Q28GR: https://a.co/d/0bBIPV7h. It's a 27" 2K 280Hz LG 4-layer W-OLED glossy monitor. The MSI monitor is $600 right now and I got the Gigabyte monitor for $455 during the prime sale. I haven't done the grayscale test on the Gigabyte monitor yet but I wil

entry.content: >Smug Hag Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Beyond misogyny
entry.content: like clockwork, everytime I’ve ever interacted with the subspecies of a pathetic excuse for an opposite gender, they’ve tried to get one over on me. It is a known fact to me, you lack an attention span, and with this, your word means nothing but a mere joke in the best case scenario. I regret ever trying to enlighten your kind on the finer things in life. But I’m elated to say I know better at this point, and it feels better to look down on you and laugh at you for even trying in the first place

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It's expected for games to cost a bit more now (but they don't actually when you…
entry.content: It's expected for games to cost a bit more now (but they don't actually when you account for inflation) since they're way longer and more complex than they were in the past. Also it's natural for the industry to move away from the physical media since digital fits the business model of video games (and movies) much better - you don't own a game/movie - since you haven't paid for its 100-million dollar budget. You own a (limited) license to play/watch it. That's it. Having the above in mind, as f

entry.title: /o/ Auto: T4 Volkswagen Transporter probelm
entry.content: I have a '92 T4 with the 2.4 liter AAB engine. I've never seen the temp warning or the glow plug lights light up when starting the car. I thought it was normal but here's a screenshot from a youtube video, showing that they should light up. Any idea why mine are dead? I even took out the whole instrument panel and replaced the LEDs. Nothing.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Old Gramophone to Modern Kit?
entry.content: I got this cool old gramophone thing. Hand cranked, no electricity, awesome. Came with a dozen shellac records from the 20s to 40s. But obviously being a steel tip one it can't play vinyls, modern ones. Is there some conversion kit, like a weight and a diamond tipi can change them around with? Or would I have to electrify it (tonearm, speakers, modern control turntable, etc?) and if so how should I go about that? Disassemble a modern one and swap the parts, wire up speakers? Or are there "kits"

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why are these so slept on (2003 to 2009 Jaguar XJ 3.0)
entry.content: >Reliable engine (3.0 Duratec V6) >Reliable trans (ZF 6HP) >Bodywork made of Aluminium so doesn't rust >Air suspension is very reliable compared to other cars from 2003 >Classic design
